paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-long-section: Split long test execution content by module, feature, case group, or priority before building, or raise paginationRiskThresholds.longSectionChars if a compact test-matrix narrative is expected.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-dense-section-block: Separate preconditions, input data, execution steps, expected results, actual results, and defect notes into distinct paragraphs or list items before layout.
paginationRiskRemediations.pagination-risk-figure-cluster: Spread evidence screenshots across '测试用例设计与执行', '测试结果', and '缺陷分析与改进', or group pass/fail screenshots by case group before layout.
